messages.content:
Explain the impact using correct acronyms where applicable.

Out of bounds read in networking in Google Chrome prior to 87.0.4280.88 allowed a remote attacker who had compromised the renderer process to obtain potentially sensitive information from process memory via a crafted HTML page.

This vulnerability allowed a remote attacker to read arbitrary data from memory, potentially exposing sensitive information. It could lead to further information disclosure if the attacker has control over the renderer process.
